title: Fiskars PowerGear X Telescopic Tree Pruner UPX86, Non-stick Coated, Steel Blade/Aluminium Handle, Length 2.4 - 4 m, Black/Orange, 1023624
features: PowerGear X Telescopic tree pruner for fresh, young shoots, branches, and twigs up to Ø 3.2 cm in treetops and dense shrubs - without the help of a ladder - with a maximum total reach of 6 m when being used

Optimized cutting head for extra efficiency and longevity, Adjustable cutting head, up to 230° and fixable in any position for cutting high branches, Clean cuts thanks to non-stick coated upper blade and hardened inner blade, Orange cutting support on the lower blade for better support when cutting the branch

Adjustable shaft thanks to telescopic handle that reaches branches at high altitude, Internal cable pull-system on the end handle for optimal power transmission and effortless cutting during long-term work, Optimized extendable handle with non-slip base and wear-resistant coating for a secure and soft grip and high durability

Long service life thanks to robust steel blades and aluminium handle, Compatible with Fiskars multi-function cutting saw (1001561) and multi-function cutting fruit picker (1001562), Original spare parts available for sale, Finnish design, 25 years warranty
Contents: 1x Fiskars PowerGear X Telescopic Tree Pruner UPX86, Non-stick Coated, Steel Blade/Aluminium Handle, Length 2.4 - 4 m, Black/Orange, UPX86, 1023624
description: From the manufacturer For young branches and twigs Bypass Telescopic Tree Pruner This tree pruner is suitable for cutting fresh and young shoots, branches and twigs with a diameter of up to 3.2 cm in treetops and dense bushes. When including the user, this tool has a total reach of 6 meters. The pruner can be rotated by 230° and locked into place if needed. Thanks to the long handle you can reach tall branches, and the internal rope system with combined with a non-stick coated upper blade of hardened steel allows you to cut effortlessly through branches. Previous page High reach This tree pruner is designed for treating fresh branches in tree tops or branches in dense bushes. Combined with the user's length, this model can reach up to 6 meters in height. 230° The head can be rotated by 230° and locked into position, meaning that it also is suitable for cutting very curved branches with a diameter of 32 mm. Easy to cut The powerful cutting mechanism is easy to use: just pull at the end of the handle. The internal string system helps you avoid overexertion when cutting. Bypass - For fresh wood The blade and counter blade cut into the wood and produce a clean cut without damaging the branch. Bypass tools are perfect for cutting fresh greenery. Quality since 1649 Fiskars stands for quality and innovation since 1649. Our scissors have cut millions of meters of fabrics. Our axes have chopped millions of trunks. Fiskars stands for 100% happiness. Next page How do you use Fiskars tree pruners of model UPX 82 and UPX 86? The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup.
